attributes.title: Tasks always visible
attributes.body: This is exactly what I wanted for daily planning on my Mac. I open the computer and instantly see what I need to do without opening a heavy task manager. It keeps me focused and reduces friction in the morning.

attributes.title: Simple and focused
attributes.body: The interface is clean and free of distractions, which helps me stay focused. I use it for small daily tasks and quick reminders during meetings. It is simple, fast, and easy to maintain throughout the day.

attributes.title: Replaced my sticky notes
attributes.body: I used to keep paper notes all around my desk, and this replaced that habit completely. It is faster to capture a thought and easier to keep everything in one place. My desk is cleaner and my tasks are clearer now.

attributes.title: Great for work checklists
attributes.body:
I use it for support follow-ups, quick reminders, and small action lists between calls. The app feels stable and lightweight even when my day gets busy, and I can keep my priorities visible without opening another full task manager.

Typical list for my mornings:
- Follow up with customer tickets
- Prepare notes for standup
- Track one personal task for the day

More color options or themes would make it even better.

attributes.title: Good, but I want recurring tasks
attributes.body: It is very good for quick todos and spontaneous reminders that pop up during work. The simplicity is a strength, especially when I need to capture something in a few seconds and keep moving. For my workflow, recurring items would make it much stronger for weekly routines, but even now it handles the essentials very well.
